---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible non-sensitive bug
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

What happened?

## Expected behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Reproduction steps

List the smallest repeatable steps.

## Browser and platform

Include the browser version, operating system, and any relevant setup details.

## Supported site

State whether the issue is tied to ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Qwen, Grok, or
is not site-specific.

## Sensitive data check

Do **not** include secrets, tokens, cookies, private keys, or personal data in
public issues.
